text: I’m trying to log in but my password was just changed without me doing anything. It’s been super frustrating because I can’t access important documents.

I have been trying to log into my account for the past several hours, but every time I enter my credentials, I just get an error message that says my account is temporarily locked. I've also noticed that I haven't received any emails or notifications regarding this issue, which is quite perplexing, considering that I usually get alerts for security. Can you assist me with unlocking my account, please?
I received the wrong item in my order, can I please get a refund? This is really frustrating because it's not what I expected.
I cannot access my account; it says my email is not recognized.
I purchased a phone case but received the wrong color. Can you issue a refund? The order was something like #12345.
I ordered a pair of shoes and they arrived with a different color! Why would you send me the wrong one? I’m really frustrated right now.
hi, i have a qustion about the billing. is there a monthly option for the pro plan? looking to confirm.
I'm experiencing an issue where the app crashes every time I try to save a draft. Also, why is there a limit on the draft size? It's very frustrating!

I've been trying to connect to the app for hours, but it just keeps crashing. I thought it was my device, but my friend has the same issue, which makes me wonder if it’s your server. This is really frustrating!

I have been trying to log into my account for days, and it's beyond frustrating! Every time I enter my credentials, it insists they're wrong. I can't believe this issue is happening to me. Why is this so hard? It's not like I forgot my password or anything! I've checked my email for password resets multiple times and I’m just not receiving anything. Is your service always this unreliable?
I received my order today, but one item is completely wrong. This is frustrating and I need a solution.
I received my order yesterday but only got 1 of the 2 items I paid for. Can you help me get a refund for the missing one? Thanks!

Greetings, I hope this message finds you well. I am seeking clarification regarding whether the pro plan is billed on a monthly basis or if it operates on an annual billing cycle, as the information provided on your website seems somewhat unclear. Thank you for your assistance.
I recently placed an order and unfortunately received the incorrect item despite my detailed specifications. I kindly request a refund for the item that was not sent correctly.

I received my order a week later than expected, despite being assured it would arrive in 3-5 business days. I am quite disappointed with this delay, especially since I had planned everything around the expected delivery date. I believe I should have received some form of communication about this issue, as it feels rather neglectful.
Can you tell me if the subscription plan includes hidden fees or extra charges?
I tried to reset my password but it says the email isn’t linked to any account, even though I’m sure I registered with it. Plus, I also can't access my profile which is super frustrating.
I can’t log in, it keeps sayng my password is wrong but I know it’s right.
This is absolutely frustrating! I've reached out multiple times about this issue, and no one has provided any assistance. I need someone to help me ASAP!
Hey, I'm confused. Is the pro plan supposed to be billed monthly or yearly? I thought it was monthly, but I just saw a charge that looks yearly, but I wasn't sure!
